overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player navigates neon-lit streets with futuristic architecture, passing holographic advertisements and pedestrians, transitioning from shaded avenues to an open plaza with towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with elevated highway ramp

events.description: turns left from corner to walk along sidewalk
futuristic sedan drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk observing traffic and architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving down the street

entered.detail: large concrete and metal ramp structure leading to upper highway
illuminated sign for Turbo establishment on building facade
short orange posts lining the edge of the sidewalk
tall modern street light with horizontal LED fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a street corner dominated by an elevated highway ramp structure. The camera turns left to follow the sidewalk, passing orange bollards and modern street lights. A futuristic sedan drives past on the asphalt road while the Turbo sign glows in the distance.

events.description: enters dense neon sign district with large holographic billboards
multiple futuristic vehicles pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: strolling past storefronts and neon signs observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: person with backpack walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large pink neon billboard with monkey logo and Japanese text
purple illuminated sign reading BEEP on building facade
pink neon sign for PieZ establishment with geometric design
large green dumpster and trash containers on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor of neon-lit buildings, the scene is dominated by the bright pink Spunky Monkey billboard and BEEP signage. The sidewalk is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and trash bins line the path. The elevated highway remains visible overhead as futuristic vehicles cruise past on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with coffee shop and vending machines

events.description: approaches Brooklyn Barista shop and open plaza area
crosses street with distinctive red pavement markings

agents.ego_description: navigating through pedestrian crossing toward the Brooklyn Barista storefront

notable_agents.action: person with bright blue hair and colorful outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading Brooklyn Barista above coffee shop entrance
bright purple automated kiosk with yellow warning symbols
teal illuminated sign for Cyberware clinic
distinctive red textured pavement marking the pedestrian crossing area
orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza dominated by the glowing red Brooklyn Barista sign. The camera crosses the distinctive red pavement toward the coffee shop, passing a purple vending machine and Cyberware clinic sign. Pedestrians in colorful cyberpunk attire walk through the intersection as the camera navigates the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with towering residential complex

events.description: looks up at towering skyscrapers and sky between buildings
turns right to walk down new street with overhead structures

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the architecture then continuing down a narrower street

notable_agents.action: woman in black outfit walking across the plaza

entered.detail: massive white hexagonal apartment tower rising high above the street
red and blue metal walkway structure connecting buildings overhead
large digital display showing animated advertisements on building facade
bright blue illuminated staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: Entering a sunlit open plaza, the camera looks up at a massive white residential tower piercing the blue sky. The overhead pedestrian bridge with its distinctive red and blue framework spans the street. After observing the architecture, the camera turns down a narrower street lined with holographic billboards and elevated highway structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shaded urban street corner into a bright, open plaza dominated by towering futuristic architecture. It begins by turning left from an elevated highway ramp, passing orange bollards and a glowing Turbo sign as a futuristic sedan cruises by. The camera then moves through a narrow corridor of neon-lit buildings, where the environment becomes saturated with the pink glow of a Spunky Monkey billboard and BEEP signage amidst a crowd of pedestrians. As the path opens into a wider plaza, the scene shifts toward the red pavement of a Brooklyn Barista crossing, passing a purple vending machine and a Cyberware clinic. Finally, the view expands into a sunlit open space beneath a massive white residential tower and a red-and-blue pedestrian bridge before turning back down a narrower street lined with holographic billboards.
